findings.summary: Evaluation reports lacked immutable dataset provenance.
Missing provider settings could implicitly select live providers.
The central policy omitted fabricated experiment-result zero tolerance.
The quality-gate job could mask failed prerequisite jobs.
Several write-capable GitHub Actions were tag-pinned instead of SHA-pinned.
No repository-owned strict Phase 3 closeout command or report contract existed.
Dotenv loading silently overrode explicit CI and verification settings.
RAGAS 0.4.3 metric namespace changes made the installed adapter unavailable.
The development group included an unused duplicate httpx2 distribution.
Phase 3 guides retained stale commands, scope, and CI-enforcement claims.

limitations: Live OpenAI, LangSmith, Phoenix, and OTLP services are outside default verification.
Dry-runs and in-memory exporters establish integration behavior, not production scale.
Judge metrics are optional and skipped values are never interpreted as zero.

section_summaries.architecture: ExperimentOS models remain authoritative; external evaluation and observability integrations remain adapters or optional sinks.
section_summaries.ci: Prerequisite exit codes, strict policy failure, always-uploaded artifacts, and informational PR reporting are verified.
section_summaries.database: Alembic, deterministic repeated ingestion, retrieval, API, and workflow database tests are required in strict mode.
section_summaries.documentation: Commands, defaults, limits, and branch-protection guidance are reviewed.
section_summaries.evaluations: Repository-owned evaluation reports are consumed through the centralized quality policy.
section_summaries.files_changed: See the feature branch diff linked to GitHub issue #68.
section_summaries.observability: NoOp, optional sink dry-runs, composite isolation, redaction, and OpenTelemetry in-memory exporters are covered without network calls.
section_summaries.phase4: Prioritize deployment-specific load validation and operational alerting only after Phase 3 closeout; do not infer production scale from this review.
section_summaries.security: External network access is test-blocked, secrets are redacted, and live providers and exports are disabled in verification.
section_summaries.tests: 38 command stages passed and 0 did not pass in strict closeout mode.

unresolved_risks: Live vendor connectivity and production load behavior require deployment-specific validation.
